title: A FAB pilot reported a stationary strong light near Recife-PE [1978]

text_preview:
SEPT 17th, 1978. Recife-PE. 

## Translation of the report:

“At 22:52Z, the pilot of FAB 2079 (RF / NT FL 070), [going from Recife-PE to Natal-RN] reported that he was seeing a strong light as if it were landing lights of an aircraft, approximately on the 330 degree radial of the VOR REC, at 45 NM and between [levels] FL 060/070. This strong light appeared to be stationary, however it was not possible to identify the source of the luminosity. The plane VASP PP-SNA (FZ / RF) [ from Fortaleza-CE to Recife-PE] was asked to make a detour to that sector in order to confirm the existence of the lig
summary: FAB pilot reported a stationary strong light at ~45 NM from Recife VOR at FL 060/070; other aircraft sent to investigate found nothing.
